title: Test Hourglass of Time: 064-E02 APPLY_ZONE_LOCK

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: Play this card at any time to reset the current player's turn. This includes all events that occurred. This card cannot be removed from the cemetery.

plan.title: Test Hourglass of Time: 064-E02 APPLY_ZONE_LOCK
plan.summary: Create a deterministic dev scenario for Hourglass of Time and verify that 064-E02 APPLY_ZONE_LOCK resolves according to the parsed effect and WARD rules. Assertions were tightened from the printed card text for headless QA.

notes: Rules text: Hourglass of Time can be played at any time to reset the current player turn, and this card cannot be removed from the cemetery.
Verify the static cemetery lock branch instead of only checking that Hourglass was played.

steps: Player 1 plays Hourglass of Time from hand.
Resolve the turn reset effect and inspect the cemetery lock marker for Hourglass of Time.
Verify the card is not merely played as a no-op magic.

expectedAssertions.label: Zone lock action was the tested branch

manualVerification: Confirm Hourglass of Time cannot be moved out of the cemetery after its reset effect resolves.
riskNotes: Fallback plan cannot infer every WARD edge case.
The engine remains source of truth; the LLM/fallback only proposes a QA plan.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run the generated scenario and update after reviewing result.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
